name: droplet
description: Smallest Liquid template engine for JavaScript

scripts.build: terser droplet.js -o droplet.min.js -c passes=3,toplevel,unsafe,pure_getters -m toplevel && node -e "const s=require('fs').statSync('droplet.min.js').size;console.log(s+' bytes');if(s>30000){console.error('FAIL: droplet.min.js is '+s+' bytes (limit 30000)');process.exit(1)}"
